name: Diamond Hotel Philippines
address: Roxas Boulevard, Corner Dr. J. Quintos Street, Manila, 1000 Metro Manila(02) 8528 3000
about: An 11-minute walk from the Embassy of the United States, this upscale tower-style hotel is 12 minutes on foot from the gardens at Rizal Park.

name: Solace Hotel
about: On a side street surrounded by cafes, bars and eateries, this unfussy budget hotel is a 15-minute walk from Vito Cruz train station and 8 km from the National Museum Complex.

name: Solace Hotel DEAL 18% less than usual
about: On a side street surrounded by cafes, bars and eateries, this unfussy budget hotel is a 15-minute walk from Vito Cruz train station and 8 km from the National Museum Complex.

name: Sheraton Manila Bay
address: M. Adriatico, corner Gen. Malvar St, Malate, Manila, 1004 Metro Manila(02) 5318 0788
about: An 8-minute walk from the Manila Baywalk, this upmarket hotel is 3 km from the 16th-century Fort Santiago and 9 km from Ninoy Aquino International Airport.

name: City Garden Suites Manila
address: 1158 A. Mabini St, Ermita, Manila, 1004 Metro Manila
about: Set in a bustling commercial area, this casual hotel is 3 km from Manila Zoo, and 2 km from both Fort Santiago and the National Museum of the Philippines.

name: Swiss-Belhotel Blulane
address: 609 Tomas Mapua St, Santa Cruz, Manila, 1003 Metro Manila(02) 8777 2258
about: Surrounded by shops and restaurants, this casual hotel is 3 km from Rizal Park, the landmark Fort Santiago and the presidential Malacañang Palace.

name: Hotel H2O
address: Manila Ocean Park, Behind the Quirino Grandstand, Rizal Park, Manila, 1000 Metro Manila(02) 7238 6100
about: Part of the waterfront Manila Ocean Park complex next to Manila Bay, this sleek hotel is 7 minutes' walk from the Rizal Park and 3 km from Paco train station.

name: Oriental Zen Suites - Manila
address: 1545 Alfonso Mendoza St, Sampaloc, Manila, 1008 Metro Manila(02) 8714 2454
about: Set off the busy R-8 road, this unpretentious hotel is an 11-minute walk from the University of Santo Tomas, 4 km from the National Museum and 14 km from Ninoy Aquino International Airport.
